text.div:
Generated Narrative: CodeSystem observation-tag

This case-sensitive code system http://314e.com/fhir/CodeSystem/observation-tag defines the following codes:

CodeDisplayDefinition
super-resource Top-level resource with no parents of its own

Indicates that, within the hierarchy of resources created through parent-child relationships, this resource occupies the top level and itself has no parent resource.

unresulted Unresulted

Indicates that neither this resource nor any recursive descendant resource bears a result or report.

name: ObservationTagCS
title: Observation Tag CodeSystem
description:
Codes used to qualify DiagnosticReport and Observation resources
within hierarchical parent-child result/report structures.

concept.display: Top-level resource with no parents of its own
concept.definition:

parent-child relationships, this resource occupies the top level
and itself has no parent resource.

Indicates that neither this resource nor any recursive descendant
resource bears a result or report.
